Anthropic should rename itself to RealOpenAI. By generously handing Claude Code over to its competitors, it has done something truly worthy of the name “OpenAI” — something even OpenAI itself has never managed.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: VEON Bets on Sovereign AI — CEO Says Local AI Models Are Next Big Profit Driver
data.description: VEON Ltd. (NASDAQ: VEON) is distinguishing itself as an innovative telecom operator by utilizing sovereign AI to boost profits. CEO Kaan Terzioglu shared in an exclusive interview that the company's digital transformation spanning a decade is evolving with locally developed AI models driving growth in Pakistan, Bangladesh, Ukraine, Kazakhstan, and Uzbekistan. Terzioglu emphasized VEON as more than a traditional telco, labeling it a digital services provider entwined with connectivity. AI serves as a foundational capability integrated across various sectors like fintech, education, healthcare, entertainment, and enterprise services. This strategic alignment is yielding positive results, with VEON's digital revenues climbing to $759 million.

data.title: Conrad Industries Announces 2025 Results and Backlog
data.description: In Morgan City, Louisiana, on March 31, 2026, Conrad Industries, Inc. (OTCID: CNRD) revealed its performance for 2025 along with its current backlog status. The financial report for the fourth quarter ending on December 31, 2025, showed a significant improvement for Conrad. They reported a net income of $4.7 million with earnings per diluted share at $0.94. This was in stark contrast to the same period in the previous year when they experienced a net loss of $14,000. These positive numbers indicate a strong turnaround in the company's financial standing.

data.title: Cryptocurrency sentiment at ‘extreme fear’ levels, but Bitcoin shows strength holding above $60,000 support amid consolidation.
data.description: The current state of the Crypto Fear and Greed Index indicates that it is stuck in the 'extreme fear' territory. Despite this, Bitcoin has sustained a lengthy consolidation period above the $60,000 support level, hinting at potential positivity in the market.

data.title: S&P Dow Jones Indices tokenizes iBoxx US Treasuries Index on Canton Network, enabling access via tokens instead of feeds.
data.description: The iBoxx US Treasuries Index by S&P Dow Jones Indices can now be accessed on the Canton Network by institutions. This move enables institutions to obtain bond benchmark data using tokens instead of traditional feeds.

data.title: Alaska Air Group announces webcast of first quarter 2026 financial results
data.description: The quarterly conference call to review the financial results of the first quarter of 2026 will be hosted by Alaska Air Group Inc. at 11:30 a.m. EDT/ 8:30 a.m. PDT. Alaska Air Group Inc. is the parent company of Alaska Airlines Inc., Hawaiian Airlines, Inc., and Horizon Air Industries Inc. Stay tuned for important insights and numbers from this call.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Diakonos Oncology/
data.description: Diakonos Oncology will present clinical data on DOC1021 (dubodencel) for pancreatic cancer and glioblastoma at AACR and AAN 2026. The news was shared on 18-Mar-2026 through a release from Diakonos Oncology on PR Newswire. The headline should reflect "AAN 2026" as updated by the company.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Signals Iran War Exit In 'Two Or Three Weeks' After Market Soars; 7 Stocks To Watch
data.description: President Trump is considering withdrawing from a potential war with Iran, regardless of the continued closure of the Strait of Hormuz. Following this news, the stock market experienced significant gains, with the Dow Jones Futures rising. Oil prices, however, remained uncertain. Trump indicated a possible exit from conflict with Iran within the next 'two or three weeks', leading to investor optimism. The market response has identified 7 key stocks to monitor in light of these developments.

data.title: Warren Buffett Is Retired, But Still Going To The Office Daily
data.description: Famed investor Warren Buffett redefined retirement by stepping down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway Inc (NYSE: BRK) at the end of 2025. Despite this, Buffett remains engaged in the company's operations, actively participating in investment decisions and visiting the office daily. In an interview with CNBC's Becky Quick, Buffett disclosed his continued involvement in the company post-retirement, revealing that he monitors the market daily and offers insights on trades. He has reinstated his charity lunch auction and maintains communication with Berkshire's Director of Financial Assets, Mark Millard, discussing the latest updates before the market opens. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ADP Jobs, ISM Services Data Will Keep Fed On Hold; S&P 500 Steady
data.description: The number of payrolls has remained stagnant in the last two months, particularly in the service sector. Following the release of the ADP jobs report and ISM Services data, it is likely that the Federal Reserve will maintain its current position. The S&P 500 index has shown stability in reaction to these developments.

data.title: 4.3% GDP Growth Overstated By Odd Video Game Inflation Data
data.description: Unusual inflation data from historic video games has contributed to the recent surge in GDP. The latest GDP growth of 4.3% may have been somewhat exaggerated due to this peculiar factor.

data.title: CPI Inflation Turns Cold, Though Data Has Issues; S&P 500 Rallies
data.description: Despite a more accommodative stance from the Federal Reserve, the stock market has not shown significant growth. Following a decrease in CPI inflation, which is considered to have some inaccuracies, the S&P 500 index experienced a notable increase.
